prestazioni: M840TE (4.0L twin-turbo V8) engine recalibration via McLaren Special Operations (MSO) bespoke ECU remap with 750+ hp output, utilizing a Motec M182 standalone ECU for direct port injection control and optimized ignition timing for 99 RON fuel compatibility

Garrett GT35R turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheels (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) and Inconel turbine housings (0.82 A/R) paired with custom MSO titanium downpipes and a secondary heat exchanger for sustained boost stability (22 psi peak)

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with MSO-specific valving, 3-way adjustable damping, and McLaren GT MSO chassis-specific spring rates (front: 220 N/mm, rear: 280 N/mm) paired with a full carbon fiber subframe brace from MSO Defined for torsional rigidity enhancement
estetica: MSO Defined 'Velocity' carbon fiber body kit with active aerodynamics, including a fixed rear wing with dual-element Gurney flaps (adjustable via McLaren Dynamics panel) and a front splitter with integrated canards (3D-printed from Toray T800 carbon fiber)

Novitec McLaren GT MSO-specific side skirts with LED-illuminated air curtains and a rear diffuser featuring titanium exhaust outlets (custom 3D-printed by MSO in collaboration with Novitec) for a 12% reduction in drag coefficient

MSO Heritage 'Speedmark' livery in 'Glacier White' with hand-painted 'MSO Blue' pinstripes (applied by McLaren's in-house paint specialists) and a full carbon fiber roof with a bespoke 'GT MSO' script inlaid via laser-engraved aluminum
